title: Howardia ringens
taxonomy: Howardia ringens is a species of succulent plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the rabbit's foot or rabbit's track. It is native to South Africa. The genus Howardia is a small group of flowering plants that are closely related to other succulents within the Aizoaceae family. The classification of Howardia ringens is further divided into two subspecies, providing more specific categorization within the plant species. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

Its medicinal uses include treating various health issues such as skin conditions, fever, and respiratory problems.
